name: Shakoothi
recipeIngredient: 3/8 t Whole dried hot red chili
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small frying pan, dry-roast coriander seeds, cumin seeds, mustard seeds, cinnamon, cloves, peppercorns, and nutmeg over medium flame until they emit a pleasant aroma.
2. Transfer the spices to a coffee grinder or spice grinder and grind them finely.
3. Place the ground spices in a bowl.
4. In the same frying pan, dry-roast grated coconut over medium flame until brown flecks form and it smells roasted; transfer to the bowl with other spices.
5. Blend garlic, ginger, green chili, and water in an electric blender until smooth.
6. Heat oil in a large frying pan or saute pan over medium-high heat. Add onions and fry until browned.
7. Pour in the blended garlic-ginger mixture; stir once.
8. Reduce heat to medium and add chicken pieces, salt, and spice-coconut mixture. Stir and cook for 3-4 minutes until chicken loses pinkness.
9. Lower heat to low and continue cooking for 25-30 minutes or until tender, stirring occasionally to ensure even color on each piece.
